title: Conditional document editor component that switches between legacy and WYSIWYG interfaces
purpose: Provides a unified interface for document editing that dynamically selects between legacy and WYSIWYG editors based on feature flags.
module_context: Exports a React component that conditionally renders either DocumentEditorLegacy or DocumentEditorWysiwyg based on feature flag configuration. Also exports the DocumentEditorProps type from the legacy editor.

steps.content: Determine whether to use the WYSIWYG editor by checking the feature flags.
IF the feature flag for WYSIWYG is enabled, render the WYSIWYG editor component.
ELSE render the legacy editor component.
Pass all props through to the selected editor component.
Initialize a ref to track whether logging has occurred.
IF this is the first render, set the ref to indicate logging has occurred.
Log the selected editor variant to the console for debugging purposes.
